The '''PK-8f Primary Threat Analysis Grid''' was a type of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] manufactured by [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]]. Alongside the [[PH-5s Phased Tachyon Detection Array]], it was part of the company's [[ANv-9q Sensor Array]] and integrated into [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil's]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].<ref name="SC" />

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{1stm}}
